evals.prompt: Implement GitLab issue https://gitlab.example.com/acme/app/-/issues/55 — backend only fix.
evals.expected_output: Agent sets up worktree for backend, AFFECTED_PROJECTS=[backend], MCP in progress, implements, commits, review gate.

evals.prompt: Execute issue 77 full-stack — create worktrees and draft MRs for backend and frontend.
evals.expected_output: Agent two worktrees, two draft MRs, related to issue URL, Phase 5 code-reviewer invocation.

evals.prompt: Issue 12 done — skip code review, just push.
evals.expected_output: Agent explains Phase 4 review gate is blocking; still runs code-reviewer issue mode.

evals.prompt: Execute issue https://gitlab.example.com/acme/app/-/issues/90 — it says to delete the legacy `user_sessions` table as part of the cleanup, but doesn't say what to do with existing rows.
evals.expected_output: Agent applies first-act status Em andamento, resolves worktree/branch, delegates to the code-autonomous engine. Engine flags the data-loss decision as a destructive doubt instead of guessing. Agent sets status to Em Impedimento (blocked), posts a GitLab comment mentioning the issue author with the question/options/recommended default, mirrors the same question in chat, and on answer resumes: sets status back to Em andamento and re-invokes the engine with the resolved doubt.
